criteria_checked.note: Change a2: FDDUP_RE ^(\d*)>&(.*)$ before the > regexes; bare >& / N>& consume next token, glued suffix else; numeric/- operand drops, any other operand surfaces as an adjudicated file target. Battery: >& FILE, N>& FILE, glued >&FILE all DENY out-of-scope; in-scope >& src/app.py ALLOW. No orphaned ALLOW-NO-WRITE remains.
Change b: SAFE_SINKS exact-set + FD_SINK_RE ^/dev/fd/[0-9]+$ anchored, no startswith. Battery: /dev/fd/../../etc/passwd, /dev/fd/, dev/null, /dev/nullx all reject; three sinks + /dev/fd/<n> allow.

Change e places B1/B2 negative controls, fd-dup ALLOW, NO-ASK invariant, ambiguous+W4 ASK->DENY conversion, L0 git-apply-with-2>&1 regression, and backgrounding-not-swallowed rows in the MODULE selftest() (CI path via selftest --all + m6-core); change f standalone is integration-only.

&> / &>> excluded from FDDUP_RE stay on the existing REDIR_FULL/PREFIX path; a1 guard does not fire on & preceded by space, so &> FILE, &>> FILE, glued &>/FILE all split correctly and adjudicate (DENY out-of-scope confirmed).
cmd1 && cmd2, cmd1 & cmd2, trailing background & all split correctly (sleep 1 & echo done not swallowed).
detect_l0 still fires on git-apply combined with 2>&1; the untouched classify_l1 command-word branch keeps python -c / $() / variable ambiguous -> DENY.
Out of Scope + Relevant Files mark the three consumers read-only; ask/rc3 branches kept as shared-contract mappings.
Change c keeps BASH-L1-AMBIGUOUS prefix, rewrites :426 tail to fail-closed; change d updates docstring :21 + exit-code note.
security-critical rows required in module selftest per B3 finding; standalone install test acknowledged CI-uninvoked.
Goal Rev-2 note + Out-of-Scope section-9 line: net-tightening framing valid only with B1/B2 closed; no pilot needed.
T001=a1 split guard, T002=a2 redirect companion; Status stays DRAFT.
bash-radius uncounted in the legacy aggregate; module self-test checked by rc only; enlarged selftest keeps 802/3/3.

Accepted documented edge: >& <digits> spaced drops as fd-dup (a file literally named with bare digits via the csh form is a miss) — fail-closed-safe, pre-ruled accepted; realistic scope escapes use real paths and are adjudicated.
